name: Peanut Butter Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the granulated sugar and evaporated milk in a heavy saucepan.
2. Cook over medium heat until the mixture reaches 238°F on a candy thermometer, stirring constantly.
3. Remove from heat and stir in the peanut butter and marshmallow cream until smooth.
4. Spread the mixture into a greased 8-inch square pan.
5. Allow to cool completely, then cut into squares.
